docket_entries.description: THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BISHOP, WILLIAM RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT WEAKLEY, ELYSE $3,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $150.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,650.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS, SEE JUDGMENT ATTACHED PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED

DECLARATION OF DUE DILIGENCE IN ATTEMPTING SERVICE SERVICE FEE $85.00 FILED BY PLAINTIFF BISHOP, WILLIAM AS TO DEFENDANT WEAKLEY, ELYSE
REMARK: RECEIVED MAIL BY POST OFFICE ON DEC 05, 2025. PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM AND ORDER CERTIFIED MAIL TO DEFENDANT RETURN TO SENDER - UNCLAIMED - UNABLE TO FORWARD
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-02-2026 ORDERED DESTROYED

REMARK: RETURNED MAIL. CLAIM AND ORDER. 12/05/25. UNCLAIMED- RETURN TO SENDER.
